title: Karl Harrison
description: England rugby league footballer and coach (born 1964)
extract: Karl Harrison (born 20 February 1964) is an English former professional rugby league footballer and coach, who played in the 1980s and 1990s, and coached in the 2000s and 2010s. He played at representative level for both Great Britain and England, and at club level for Bramley, Featherstone Rovers, Hull FC (two spells) and Halifax, as a prop. He has coached England, Keighley Cougars, Salford City Reds, Batley Bulldogs and Halifax. Harrison is a Halifax Hall of Fame Inductee.
